content: Let's audit the auth flow first.
OK — composite middleware reads Authorization, dispatches to OIDC or ks_live_ key handler.
Right. The api_keys.py file mints ks_live_ via secrets.token_urlsafe + argon2id lookup_hash.
And the device-code flow is delegated to Authentik per Phase 3 D-14.
Actually wait — drop auth. I want to switch to the compile pipeline.
Pydantic-ai Agent + UsageLimits + asyncio.wait_for + LoopDetector — same pattern Phase 5 D-05 reuses on the client.
backup endpoint is POST /v1/admin/backup; streams tar.gz.
Manifest shape — manifest.json must be the FIRST tar entry.
Phase 3 composite middleware; v1 = all auth'd see all.
